case_title: SY JEANNETTE VS MUNICIPAL RAILWAY CLAIMS DEPT.

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SY JEANNETTE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUNICIPAL RAILWAY CLAIMS DEPT. $706.00 PRINCIPAL, $12.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $718.79, PLAINTIFF WAS 70% NEGLIGENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,352.56 FILED BY SY JEANNETTE AS TO DEFENDANT MUNICIPAL RAILWAY CLAIMS DEPT. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-26-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MUNICIPAL RAILWAY CLAIMS DEPT.
CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO BERNARD SHEW RETURNED SIGNED.
